name: Master Service Agreement
description: Standard agreement for software development, IT outsourcing, consulting and service contracts.

name: Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Unilateral or bilateral NDA template for confidential business discussions and trials.

name: SLA Agreement
description: Service level agreement framework detailing uptime commitments, response times, and penalty terms.

name: Vendor Agreement
description: General vendor services and physical goods supply contract template.
